item.title: The Houthis, a Shiite militia in Yemen, which is aligned wit…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Houthis, a Shiite militia in Yemen, which is aligned with Iran, have announced a naval blockade of a key waterway, the Bab Al-Mandeb Strait. n.pr/3Tc2obf
item.content:encoded: The Houthis, a Shiite militia in Yemen, which is aligned with Iran, have announced a naval blockade of a key waterway, the Bab Al-Mandeb Strait. n.pr/3Tc2obf

item.title: Journalist Pamela Colloff has written an engrossing and damn…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Journalist Pamela Colloff has written an engrossing and damning book on how the case of the 1985 killing of 14-year-old Shelly Boggio played out. n.pr/4vRrvOo
item.content:encoded: Journalist Pamela Colloff has written an engrossing and damning book on how the case of the 1985 killing of 14-year-old Shelly Boggio played out. n.pr/4vRrvOo

item.title: Rusko has announced an indefinite hiatus from music, citing …
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description: Rusko has announced an indefinite hiatus from music, citing the need to search for "healing and recovery"

item.title: President Donald Trump on Monday imposed 50% tariffs on most…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Donald Trump on Monday imposed 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods, declaring that Canada has unfairly discriminated against American autos, alcohol and dairy products. n.pr/45b2q5U
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump on Monday imposed 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods, declaring that Canada has unfairly discriminated against American autos, alcohol and dairy products. n.pr/45b2q5U

item.title: Only about 1 in 8 nurses are men, but their share is growing…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Only about 1 in 8 nurses are men, but their share is growing. A strong job market for nurses and sustained efforts to recruit men into the field have made a difference, including in the South. n.pr/4hu0aOm
item.content:encoded: Only about 1 in 8 nurses are men, but their share is growing. A strong job market for nurses and sustained efforts to recruit men into the field have made a difference, including in the South. n.pr/4hu0aOm

item.title: Arizona Democrats choose who can try to flip a Republican-he…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Arizona Democrats choose who can try to flip a Republican-held House seat and Republicans pick their nominee to try to unseat a Democratic governor. n.pr/3Rm3IYC
item.content:encoded: Arizona Democrats choose who can try to flip a Republican-held House seat and Republicans pick their nominee to try to unseat a Democratic governor. n.pr/3Rm3IYC

item.title: When Joseph Lamont Williams refused to leave the public park…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: When Joseph Lamont Williams refused to leave the public park where he has lived for years, he was charged with a felony. Camping bans are on the rise as states seek to crack down on homelessness. n.pr/4wXErmI
item.content:encoded: When Joseph Lamont Williams refused to leave the public park where he has lived for years, he was charged with a felony. Camping bans are on the rise as states seek to crack down on homelessness. n.pr/4wXErmI
